prompt: Create a gritty cyberpunk streetwear editorial fashion photograph at night, styled as a conceptual collaboration between Supreme and Ghost in the Shell Section 9. Show one androgynous model crouching low in a wet industrial alley or underpass, one arm stretched up and braced against a rusted metal post on the left, the other hand resting near the hip. The model has long dark hair parted in the center, an intentionally anonymized or softly blurred face, and pointed cybernetic-looking ears. Outfit: black high-neck long-sleeve top with a centered red rectangular Supreme box logo on the chest, oversized black cargo pants, black shoes, fingerless black gloves, a transparent smoky-gray rain jacket, and a clear tactical utility belt with two visible hard-plastic pouches plus a dangling ID badge. Add a black shoulder tote bag on the model’s right side printed with white futuristic graphics and the visible text SECTION 9, smaller Japanese-style technical text, circular cybernetic schematics, interface bars, and tiny icon marks. Environment: dark damp concrete, puddles reflecting cold light, peeling pipes and railings on the right, rust-stained column on the left, high-contrast flash photography, teal-gray shadows, raw urban texture, rain-slick reflections, underground security-zone atmosphere. Composition: square image, medium-full body from slightly above eye level, model centered but leaning diagonally, left arm forming a strong line to the upper-left corner, bag and chest logo clearly readable, fashion campaign realism rather than illustration. Lighting and style: harsh on-camera flash mixed with moody ambient darkness, desaturated black and green-gray palette with the red logo as the only strong color accent, film grain, documentary street style, premium editorial look, cybernetic tactical details, no extra people, no captions or borders.
